product_overview: MUJSTAYS is a web-based PG discovery and booking platform for Manipal University Jaipur students, enabling verified owner listings, room-level booking with online payments, in-app chat, and admin moderation. The system is built as single-file PHP pages with PDO-backed MySQL and role-based session auth.
core_goals: Provide a verified, MUJ-centric searchable directory of PGs with rich listing pages and owner KYC badges
Enable a smooth booking workflow: request/instant booking, online advance payments (Razorpay), booking history and receipts
Offer owner tools for listing creation, booking management and earnings visibility, and an admin panel for moderation
Support in-app messaging, reviews, saved/compare workflows and timely notifications to increase conversion
Ship an easy-to-deploy codebase (single config file) that runs on XAMPP locally and cPanel in production

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: User signup, login, email OTP verification and password recovery for students, owners and admins with session-based role redirects.
user_flows: POST /signup.php with role=student, name, email, password -> Receive 201 with session cookie and is_verified=0 -> POST /verify-email.php with session and otp=123456 -> Receive 200 and is_verified=1 -> POST /login.php with email and password -> Receive 200 and session established -> GET /user/dashboard.php with session -> Receive 200 and dashboard HTML
POST /signup.php with duplicate email -> Receive 409 Duplicate Email error and validation message

POST /forgot-password.php with registered email -> Receive 200 with OTP sent to email -> POST /reset-password.php with email, otp and new_password -> Receive 200 password reset success -> POST /login.php with new password -> Receive 200 and session
POST /verify-email.php with expired_or_wrong_otp -> Receive 400 Invalid or expired OTP and remain is_verified=0

features.name: PG Discovery
features.description: Public discovery pages: home (featured), explore with filters and pagination, and detailed PG pages with room types and amenities.
user_flows: GET /index.php -> Receive 200 with featured PGs (is_featured=1) and site hero content
GET /explore.php?area=Jagatpura&price_max=8000&room_type=single&page=1 -> Receive 200 with filtered results and pagination metadata
GET /pg-detail.php?id=123 -> Receive 200 with PG details, gallery, room_types and owner summary
GET /pg-detail.php?id=999999 -> Receive 404 Not Found when PG id does not exist or is not approved

features.name: Booking & Payments (Student Services)
features.description: Students can request or instant-book room types, pay advances via Razorpay, view booking history and cancel eligible bookings.
user_flows: POST /login.php with student credentials -> Receive 200 and session cookie -> POST /user/bookings.php with pg_id=123, room_type_id=5, move_in_date=2026-05-10, booking_type=request -> Receive 201 booking created with status=pending and booking_id=789
POST /user/bookings.php with pg_id=456 for instant-enabled listing -> Receive 201 booking created with status=confirmed and room_types.available_beds decremented

POST /user/bookings.php with booking_id=789 and payment_option=online -> Receive 201 and redirect data or token to initiate payment -> POST /user/payments.php with booking_id=789 -> Receive 200 {gateway_order_id} -> Complete Razorpay checkout (external) -> POST /user/payments.php with gateway_payment_id & signature for verification -> Receive 200 payment verified and booking status updated to confirmed -> GET /user/bookings.php -> Receive 200 shows confirmed booking
POST /user/bookings.php for a room_type with available_beds=0 -> Receive 409 Conflict: No beds available and booking not created
POST /user/payments.php verify step with invalid_signature -> Receive 400 Payment verification failed and booking remains pending

features.name: Chat & Reviews (Student Services)
features.description: In-app messaging between students and owners and post-stay reviews tied to confirmed bookings.
user_flows: POST /login.php with student credentials -> Receive 200 and session cookie -> GET /user/chat.php?conversation_id=55 with session -> Receive 200 conversation thread JSON -> POST /user/chat.php with receiver_id=owner_id, pg_id=123, message_text='Is the room furnished?' -> Receive 201 message created -> GET /user/chat.php?conversation_id=55 -> Receive 200 includes new message
GET /user/chat.php without session -> Receive 401 Unauthorized and redirect to /login.php

POST /user/reviews.php with student_id, pg_id=123, booking_id=789, rating=5, review_text='Great stay' after booking status=completed -> Receive 201 review created and pg_listings.avg_rating & total_reviews updated
POST /user/reviews.php with no matching completed booking -> Receive 403 Forbidden: Only verified tenants with completed bookings can post reviews

features.name: Owner Management
features.description: Owner-facing flows for creating multi-step listings with photos/room types, managing bookings (accept/reject) and viewing dashboard metrics.
user_flows: POST /login.php with owner credentials -> Receive 200 and session cookie -> POST /owner/add-listing.php with title, description, address, room_types JSON and multipart photos (>=3) -> Receive 201 listing created with status=pending and listing_id=321
GET /owner/dashboard.php with owner session -> Receive 200 showing pending listings, occupancy and recent bookings
POST /owner/add-listing.php missing required photos or invalid file type -> Receive 422 Validation Error with field-level messages and listing not created
POST /owner/bookings.php?action=accept&booking_id=789 with owner session -> Receive 200 booking updated to confirmed and room_types.available_beds decremented
POST /owner/bookings.php?action=reject&booking_id=790 with owner session and reason -> Receive 200 booking updated to rejected and notification emailed to student

features.name: Admin Panel & Moderation
features.description: Admin workflows to approve/reject/feature listings, verify owner KYC, manage users and view platform metrics.
user_flows: POST /login.php with admin credentials -> Receive 200 and admin session cookie -> GET /admin/listings.php?status=pending with admin session -> Receive 200 list of pending listings -> POST /admin/listings.php with action=approve&listing_id=321 and admin session -> Receive 200 listing status updated to approved and owner notified
POST /admin/listings.php with action=reject&listing_id=322&reason='Insufficient photos' with admin session -> Receive 200 listing status updated to rejected and rejection_reason stored
POST /admin/listings.php without admin session -> Receive 403 Forbidden and no action performed

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Signup, login, email verification, and password recovery

features.name: Student Services
features.description: Booking, payments, chat, and reviews for students

features.name: Owner Management
features.description: Listing and booking management for PG owners
